title: Indian Mulligatawney
ingredients: ¾ cup chopped apple (I use Granny Smith)
1 ½ cup pureed garbanzo beans (use canned, drained garbanzo beans-puree in food processor or blender)
instructions: Heat oil and butter in saucepan.  Add chopped vegetables and apples, salt, red pepper and curry powder.  Cook, stirring frequently, until onions are almost tender.

Meanwhile, heat stock to boiling point.  Make a smooth paste of cornstarch and water.  Add to stock, stirring constantly, until stock returns to boil.  Add sauteed vegetables and remaining ingredients, except parsley.  Heat to serving temperature.  Serve garnished with chopped parsley.
